title: Screenplay
description: Output of 02_1_screenplay: one scene's prose dramatized into an ordered list of screenplay elements (sluglines, action, dialogue, narration, transitions). Source-of-scene-structure for 02_2_scene_extraction, which segments these elements into film scenes.

title.description: Optional short title for the source scene

type.description: slugline = INT./EXT. LOCATION - TIME (marks a film-scene boundary); action = what a camera sees; dialogue = spoken lines (needs character); narration = voiceover / narrator text; transition = CUT TO / DISSOLVE etc.

character.description: Speaking character; present for dialogue elements
